input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.8
            TITLE: protection – the gas cylinder/tank and lines must be protected from rollover, collision from

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.8: Protection – The gas cylinder/tank and lines must be protected from rollover, collision from
T.6.1.8 Protection – The gas cylinder/tank and lines must be protected from rollover, collision from 
any direction, or damage resulting from the failure of rotating equipment

final_answer: Protection – The gas cylinder/tank and lines must be protected from rollover, collision from any direction, or damage resulting from the failure of rotating equipment
